payload.markdown:
You are an expert Unity 6 UI/UX developer specializing in XR Interaction Toolkit and World Space Canvas for VR.

Create a complete, ready-to-use VR course selection interface for Edumy platform.

Requirements:
- Use World Space Canvas (large floating holographic panel).
- Layout: Split screen 45% left - 55% right.
  - LEFT (45%): Large course thumbnail image (RawImage or Image component, 4:3 ratio, with subtle glow shader). The image should display the selected course's cover.
  - RIGHT (55%): Vertical Scroll View containing a list of courses from the web API[](http://192.168.1.1:3000/courses).
    Each list item must include:
      - Course title (TextMeshPro, large bold)
      - Short description (1-2 lines)
      - Progress bar (Slider + TMP)
      - Button "Tiếp tục" or "Đăng ký" (with XR Grab Interactable or Button + raycast interaction)
- Header at top: "Khóa học của tôi" + search bar (TMP Input Field).
- Bottom navigation: Button "Quay lại VR Classroom" and "Cài đặt".
- Style: Dark futuristic theme, blue neon accents, high contrast, large fonts (minimum 40pt for VR readability), clean minimalist design.
- Must be fully interactive with XR Interaction Toolkit:
  - Raycast from controller to select courses
  - Scroll with hand or thumbstick
  - Button press with raycast
- The panel should be grabbable (XR Grab Interactable on the Canvas root) so user can move and rotate it.
- Add subtle particle glow and hover effects on list items.
- Use Unity 6 best practices: TMP, new UI Toolkit where possible, but World Space Canvas is required.

Generate:
1. The complete C# script (CourseSelectionUI.cs) with all necessary components and API calling logic.
2. Step-by-step hierarchy setup in the scene (which GameObjects to create).
3. How to connect to the existing ApiManager.cs to fetch courses from /courses endpoint.

Make it production-ready and optimized for Quest 3.

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Defining Script Functionality**

I'm now zeroing in on the script's core functions. The `CourseSelectionUI.cs` will be responsible for the primary panel management, linking with the thumbnail image, populating the course list, and implementing the search filter. I'm planning to use an `Awake/Start` setup for listeners, `FetchCourses` to get data via `ApiManager`, `PopulateList` to create items, `OnItemHovered` to update the thumbnail, and `OnItemClicked` to handle interactions, and then `Filter` for search functionality.

payload.markdown:
<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "643af774-ce89-46b1-8deb-088d261d9ea8", "args": {"description": "Create CourseSelectionUI.cs with API integration and VR UI logic.", "filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/CourseSelectionUI.cs", "oldString": "", "newString": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using System.Linq;
using UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit;
using UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Interactables;

public class CourseSelectionUI : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("Layout References")]
    [SerializeField] private RawImage selectedThumbnail;
    [SerializeField] private Transform listContentContainer;
    [SerializeField] private GameObject courseListItemPrefab;
    [SerializeField] private TMP_InputField searchInputField;
    [SerializeField] private TextMeshProUGUI headerTitle;

    [Header("Navigation Buttons")]
    [SerializeField] private Button backToVRClassroomBtn;
    [SerializeField] private Button settingsBtn;

    [Header("Visual Effects")]
    [SerializeField] private GameObject loadingOverlay;
    [SerializeField] private Color neonBlue = new Color(0, 0.9f, 1f, 1f);

    private List<CourseData> allCourses = new List<CourseData>();
    private List<GameObject> activeItems = new List<GameObject>();

    private async void Start()
    {
        headerTitle.text = "Khóa học của tôi";
        
        // Setup Search
        searchInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener(OnSearchChanged);

        // Setup Buttons
        backToVRClassroomBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => Debug.Log("Back to VR Classroom"));
        settingsBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => Debug.Log("Opening Settings"));

        // Initial Fetch
        await RefreshCourses();
    }

    public async Task RefreshCourses()
    {
        if (loadingOverlay != null) loadingOverlay.SetActive(true);

        try
        {
            var courses = await ApiManager.Instance.GetCoursesAsync();
            if (courses != null)
            {
                allCourses = courses;
                DisplayCourses(allCourses);
            }
        }
        catch (System.Exception e)
        {
            Debug.LogError($"[CourseSelectionUI] Error fetching courses: {e.Message}");
        }

        if (loadingOverlay != null) loadingOverlay.SetActive(false);
    }

    private void DisplayCourses(List<CourseData> coursesToDisplay)
    {
        // Clear existing items
        foreach (var item in activeItems)
        {
            Destroy(item);
        }
        activeItems.Clear();

        foreach (var course in coursesToDisplay)
        {
            GameObject itemObj = Instantiate(courseListItemPrefab, listContentContainer);
            activeItems.Add(itemObj);

            var itemUI = itemObj.GetComponent<CourseListItemUI>();
            if (itemUI != null)
            {
                itemUI.Setup(course, OnCourseClicked, OnCourseHovered);
            }
        }

        // Auto-select first course if available
        if (coursesToDisplay.Count > 0)
        {
            UpdateThumbnail(coursesToDisplay[0].thumbnailUrl);
        }
    }

    private void OnSearchChanged(string query)
    {
        var filtered = allCourses.Where(c => 
            c.title.ToLower().Contains(query.ToLower()) || 
            c.description.ToLower().Contains(query.ToLower())
        ).ToList();

        DisplayCourses(filtered);
    }

    private void OnCourseClicked(CourseData course)
    {
        Debug.Log($"Continuing course: {course.title}");
        // Add logic to open the course (e.g., transition to Lesson List)
    }

    private async void OnCourseHovered(CourseData course)
    {
        UpdateThumbnail(course.thumbnailUrl);
    }

    private async void UpdateThumbnail(string url)
    {
        if (selectedThumbnail == null) return;

        var texture = await ApiManager.Instance.DownloadImageAsync(url);
        if (texture != null && selectedThumbnail != null)
        {
            selectedThumbnail.texture = texture;
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

payload.markdown:
<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "095f4b85-8d6e-4999-842b-4750556fdcd5", "args": {"newString": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;
using System;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;

public class CourseListItemUI : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
{
    [Header("UI Components")]
    [SerializeField] private TextMeshProUGUI titleText;
    [SerializeField] private TextMeshProUGUI descText;
    [SerializeField] private TextMeshProUGUI progressText;
    [SerializeField] private Slider progressSlider;
    [SerializeField] private Button actionButton;
    [SerializeField] private Image background;

    [Header("Styling")]
    [SerializeField] private Color normalColor = new Color(0.1f, 0.15f, 0.25f, 0.8f);
    [SerializeField] private Color hoverColor = new Color(0, 0.9f, 1f, 0.2f);
    [SerializeField] private Color accentColor = new Color(0, 0.9f, 1f, 1f);

    private CourseData currentCourse;
    private Action<CourseData> onClicked;
    private Action<CourseData> onHovered;

    public void Setup(CourseData data, Action<CourseData> clickCallback, Action<CourseData> hoverCallback)
    {
        currentCourse = data;
        onClicked = clickCallback;
        onHovered = hoverCallback;

        titleText.text = data.title;
        descText.text = data.description;
        
        float progress = (float)data.completedLessons / data.totalLessons;
        progressSlider.value = progress;
        progressText.text = $"{data.completedLessons}/{data.totalLessons} Lessons";

        actionButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
        actionButton.onClick.AddListener(() => onClicked?.Invoke(currentCourse));

        // Setup visuals
        if (background != null) background.color = normalColor;
        
        // Ensure buttons have proper label
        var btnText = actionButton.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
        if (btnText != null) btnText.text = progress > 0 ? "Tiếp tục" : "Đăng ký";
    }

    public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
    {
        if (background != null) background.color = hoverColor;
        onHovered?.Invoke(currentCourse);
        
        // Add subtle scale effect
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one * 1.02f;
    }

    public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
    {
        if (background != null) background.color = normalColor;
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one;
    }
}

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "643af774-ce89-46b1-8deb-088d261d9ea8", "args": {"description": "Create CourseSelectionUI.cs with API integration and VR UI logic.", "filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/CourseSelectionUI.cs", "oldString": "", "newString": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using System.Linq;
using UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit;
using UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Interactables;

public class CourseSelectionUI : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("Layout References")]
    [SerializeField] private RawImage selectedThumbnail;
    [SerializeField] private Transform listContentContainer;
    [SerializeField] private GameObject courseListItemPrefab;
    [SerializeField] private TMP_InputField searchInputField;
    [SerializeField] private TextMeshProUGUI headerTitle;

    [Header("Navigation Buttons")]
    [SerializeField] private Button backToVRClassroomBtn;
    [SerializeField] private Button settingsBtn;

    [Header("Visual Effects")]
    [SerializeField] private GameObject loadingOverlay;
    [SerializeField] private Color neonBlue = new Color(0, 0.9f, 1f, 1f);

    private List<CourseData> allCourses = new List<CourseData>();
    private List<GameObject> activeItems = new List<GameObject>();

    private async void Start()
    {
        headerTitle.text = "Khóa học của tôi";
        
        // Setup Search
        searchInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener(OnSearchChanged);

        // Setup Buttons
        backToVRClassroomBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => Debug.Log("Back to VR Classroom"));
        settingsBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => Debug.Log("Opening Settings"));

        // Initial Fetch
        await RefreshCourses();
    }

    public async Task RefreshCourses()
    {
        if (loadingOverlay != null) loadingOverlay.SetActive(true);

        try
        {
            var courses = await ApiManager.Instance.GetCoursesAsync();
            if (courses != null)
            {
                allCourses = courses;
                DisplayCourses(allCourses);
            }
        }
        catch (System.Exception e)
        {
            Debug.LogError($"[CourseSelectionUI] Error fetching courses: {e.Message}");
        }

        if (loadingOverlay != null) loadingOverlay.SetActive(false);
    }

    private void DisplayCourses(List<CourseData> coursesToDisplay)
    {
        // Clear existing items
        foreach (var item in activeItems)
        {
            Destroy(item);
        }
        activeItems.Clear();

        foreach (var course in coursesToDisplay)
        {
            GameObject itemObj = Instantiate(courseListItemPrefab, listContentContainer);
            activeItems.Add(itemObj);

            var itemUI = itemObj.GetComponent<CourseListItemUI>();
            if (itemUI != null)
            {
                itemUI.Setup(course, OnCourseClicked, OnCourseHovered);
            }
        }

        // Auto-select first course if available
        if (coursesToDisplay.Count > 0)
        {
            UpdateThumbnail(coursesToDisplay[0].thumbnailUrl);
        }
    }

    private void OnSearchChanged(string query)
    {
        var filtered = allCourses.Where(c => 
            c.title.ToLower().Contains(query.ToLower()) || 
            c.description.ToLower().Contains(query.ToLower())
        ).ToList();

        DisplayCourses(filtered);
    }

    private void OnCourseClicked(CourseData course)
    {
        Debug.Log($"Continuing course: {course.title}");
        // Add logic to open the course (e.g., transition to Lesson List)
    }

    private async void OnCourseHovered(CourseData course)
    {
        UpdateThumbnail(course.thumbnailUrl);
    }

    private async void UpdateThumbnail(string url)
    {
        if (selectedThumbnail == null) return;

        var texture = await ApiManager.Instance.DownloadImageAsync(url);
        if (texture != null && selectedThumbnail != null)
        {
            selectedThumbnail.texture = texture;
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;
using System;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;

public class CourseListItemUI : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
{
    [Header("UI Components")]
    [SerializeField] private TextMeshProUGUI titleText;
    [SerializeField] private TextMeshProUGUI descText;
    [SerializeField] private TextMeshProUGUI progressText;
    [SerializeField] private Slider progressSlider;
    [SerializeField] private Button actionButton;
    [SerializeField] private Image background;

    [Header("Styling")]
    [SerializeField] private Color normalColor = new Color(0.1f, 0.15f, 0.25f, 0.8f);
    [SerializeField] private Color hoverColor = new Color(0, 0.9f, 1f, 0.2f);
    [SerializeField] private Color accentColor = new Color(0, 0.9f, 1f, 1f);

    private CourseData currentCourse;
    private Action<CourseData> onClicked;
    private Action<CourseData> onHovered;

    public void Setup(CourseData data, Action<CourseData> clickCallback, Action<CourseData> hoverCallback)
    {
        currentCourse = data;
        onClicked = clickCallback;
        onHovered = hoverCallback;

        titleText.text = data.title;
        descText.text = data.description;
        
        float progress = (float)data.completedLessons / data.totalLessons;
        progressSlider.value = progress;
        progressText.text = $"{data.completedLessons}/{data.totalLessons} Lessons";

        actionButton.onClick.RemoveAllListeners();
        actionButton.onClick.AddListener(() => onClicked?.Invoke(currentCourse));

        // Setup visuals
        if (background != null) background.color = normalColor;
        
        // Ensure buttons have proper label
        var btnText = actionButton.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>();
        if (btnText != null) btnText.text = progress > 0 ? "Tiếp tục" : "Đăng ký";
    }

    public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData eventData)
    {
        if (background != null) background.color = hoverColor;
        onHovered?.Invoke(currentCourse);
        
        // Add subtle scale effect
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one * 1.02f;
    }

    public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData eventData)
    {
        if (background != null) background.color = normalColor;
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one;
    }
}

payload.markdown:
<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "028b95b7-c988-4462-acf6-daa4d59599a0", "args": {"filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/CourseSelectionPanel.cs", "newString": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public class CourseSelectionPanel : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("UI Prefabs & Containers")]
    [SerializeField] private GameObject courseCardPrefab;
    [SerializeField] private Transform contentContainer;
    [SerializeField] private Button closeButton;
    [SerializeField] private GameObject loadingSpinner;
    [SerializeField] private LessonListPanel lessonListPanel;

    [Header("VR Placement Settings")]
    [SerializeField] public float distanceFromUser = 1.8f; // Gần hơn một chút để dễ đọc khi nhỏ
    [SerializeField] public float horizontalAngle = 35f;   // Lệch sang phải 35 độ
    [SerializeField] public float verticalOffset = -0.2f; // Hạ thấp xuống một chút
    [SerializeField] public float tiltAngle = -10f;       // Nghiêng ít hơn
    [SerializeField] public float smoothFollowSpeed = 3.0f; 
    [SerializeField] public float panelScale = 0.6f;      // Thu nhỏ panel xuống 60%

    private Transform mainCameraTransform;

    private void Start()
    {
        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;
        if (closeButton != null) closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));
        
        // Áp dụng scale ban đầu
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one * panelScale;
        
        RefreshCourses();
    }

    private void LateUpdate()
    {
        if (mainCameraTransform == null) return;

        // 1. Tính toán hướng mục tiêu (Forward + Offset sang phải)
        Quaternion rotationOffset = Quaternion.AngleAxis(horizontalAngle, Vector3.up);
        Vector3 targetDirection = rotationOffset * mainCameraTransform.forward;
        
        // 2. Tính toán vị trí mục tiêu
        Vector3 targetPos = mainCameraTransform.position + (targetDirection * distanceFromUser);
        targetPos.y += verticalOffset; // Áp dụng độ cao
        
        // 3. Smooth follow vị trí
        transform.position = Vector3.Lerp(transform.position, targetPos, Time.deltaTime * smoothFollowSpeed);

        // 4. Xoay panel đối diện người dùng
        Vector3 directionToUser = transform.position - mainCameraTransform.position;
        if (directionToUser != Vector3.zero)
        {
            Quaternion targetRot = Quaternion.LookRotation(directionToUser);
            targetRot *= Quaternion.Euler(tiltAngle, 0, 0); 
            
            transform.rotation = Quaternion.Slerp(transform.rotation, targetRot, Time.deltaTime * smoothFollowSpeed);
        }
    }

    public async void RefreshCourses()
    {
        if (loadingSpinner != null) loadingSpinner.SetActive(true);
        
        foreach (Transform child in contentContainer)
        {
            Destroy(child.gameObject);
        }

        var courses = await ApiManager.Instance.GetCoursesAsync();
        
        if (courses != null)
        {
            foreach (var course in courses)
            {
                var cardObj = Instantiate(courseCardPrefab, contentContainer);
                var card = cardObj.GetComponent<CourseCard>();
                if (card != null)
                {
                    card.Setup(course, OnCourseSelected);
                }
            }
        }

        if (loadingSpinner != null) loadingSpinner.SetActive(false);
    }

    private void OnCourseSelected(CourseData data)
    {
        gameObject.SetActive(false);
        if (lessonListPanel != null)
        {
            lessonListPanel.gameObject.SetActive(true);
            lessonListPanel.ShowLessons(data);
        }
    }
}
", "oldString": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public class CourseSelectionPanel : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("UI Prefabs & Containers")]
    [SerializeField] private GameObject courseCardPrefab;
    [SerializeField] private Transform contentContainer;
    [SerializeField] private Button closeButton;
    [SerializeField] private GameObject loadingSpinner;
    [SerializeField] private LessonListPanel lessonListPanel;

    [Header("VR Comfort Settings")]
    [SerializeField] public float distanceFromUser = 2.2f; // Khoảng cách thoải mái cho VR
    [SerializeField] public float tiltAngle = -20f;       // Nghiêng nhẹ xuống để dễ nhìn
    [SerializeField] public float smoothFollowSpeed = 2.0f; 

    private Transform mainCameraTransform;

    private void Start()
    {
        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;
        closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));
        RefreshCourses();
    }

    private void LateUpdate()
    {
        if (mainCameraTransform == null) return;

        // 1. Tính toán vị trí mục tiêu (phía trước người dùng)
        Vector3 targetPos = mainCameraTransform.position + mainCameraTransform.forward * distanceFromUser;
        
        // 2. Smooth follow vị trí
        transform.position = Vector3.Lerp(transform.position, targetPos, Time.deltaTime * smoothFollowSpeed);

        // 3. Xoay panel đối diện người dùng nhưng giữ góc nghiêng tiltAngle
        Vector3 directionToUser = transform.position - mainCameraTransform.position;
        if (directionToUser != Vector3.zero)
        {
            Quaternion targetRot = Quaternion.LookRotation(directionToUser);
            targetRot *= Quaternion.Euler(tiltAngle, 0, 0); // Áp dụng độ nghiêng
            
            transform.rotation = Quaternion.Slerp(transform.rotation, targetRot, Time.deltaTime * smoothFollowSpeed);
        }
    }

    public async void RefreshCourses()
    {
        if (loadingSpinner != null) loadingSpinner.SetActive(true);
        
        // Xóa các card cũ
        foreach (Transform child in contentContainer)
        {
            Destroy(child.gameObject);
        }

        var courses = await ApiManager.Instance.GetCoursesAsync();
        
        if (courses != null)
        {
            foreach (var course in courses)
            {
                var cardObj = Instantiate(courseCardPrefab, contentContainer);
                var card = cardObj.GetComponent<CourseCard>();
                card.Setup(course, OnCourseSelected);
            }
        }

        if (loadingSpinner != null) loadingSpinner.SetActive(false);
    }

    private void OnCourseSelected(CourseData data)
    {
        gameObject.SetActive(false);
        if (lessonListPanel != null)
        {
            lessonListPanel.gameObject.SetActive(true);
            lessonListPanel.ShowLessons(data);
        }
    }
}

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Re-Evaluating Positioning Strategy**

I also need to ensure that the panel's visibility and interaction aren't obstructed.

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Fine-Tuning the Panel's Design**

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "028b95b7-c988-4462-acf6-daa4d59599a0", "args": {"filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/CourseSelectionPanel.cs", "newString": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public class CourseSelectionPanel : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("UI Prefabs & Containers")]
    [SerializeField] private GameObject courseCardPrefab;
    [SerializeField] private Transform contentContainer;
    [SerializeField] private Button closeButton;
    [SerializeField] private GameObject loadingSpinner;
    [SerializeField] private LessonListPanel lessonListPanel;

    [Header("VR Placement Settings")]
    [SerializeField] public float distanceFromUser = 1.8f; // Gần hơn một chút để dễ đọc khi nhỏ
    [SerializeField] public float horizontalAngle = 35f;   // Lệch sang phải 35 độ
    [SerializeField] public float verticalOffset = -0.2f; // Hạ thấp xuống một chút
    [SerializeField] public float tiltAngle = -10f;       // Nghiêng ít hơn
    [SerializeField] public float smoothFollowSpeed = 3.0f; 
    [SerializeField] public float panelScale = 0.6f;      // Thu nhỏ panel xuống 60%

    private Transform mainCameraTransform;

    private void Start()
    {
        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;
        if (closeButton != null) closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));
        
        // Áp dụng scale ban đầu
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one * panelScale;
        
        RefreshCourses();
    }

    private void LateUpdate()
    {
        if (mainCameraTransform == null) return;

        // 1. Tính toán hướng mục tiêu (Forward + Offset sang phải)
        Quaternion rotationOffset = Quaternion.AngleAxis(horizontalAngle, Vector3.up);
        Vector3 targetDirection = rotationOffset * mainCameraTransform.forward;
        
        // 2. Tính toán vị trí mục tiêu
        Vector3 targetPos = mainCameraTransform.position + (targetDirection * distanceFromUser);
        targetPos.y += verticalOffset; // Áp dụng độ cao
        
        // 3. Smooth follow vị trí
        transform.position = Vector3.Lerp(transform.position, targetPos, Time.deltaTime * smoothFollowSpeed);

        // 4. Xoay panel đối diện người dùng
        Vector3 directionToUser = transform.position - mainCameraTransform.position;
        if (directionToUser != Vector3.zero)
        {
            Quaternion targetRot = Quaternion.LookRotation(directionToUser);
            targetRot *= Quaternion.Euler(tiltAngle, 0, 0); 
            
            transform.rotation = Quaternion.Slerp(transform.rotation, targetRot, Time.deltaTime * smoothFollowSpeed);
        }
    }

    public async void RefreshCourses()
    {
        if (loadingSpinner != null) loadingSpinner.SetActive(true);
        
        foreach (Transform child in contentContainer)
        {
            Destroy(child.gameObject);
        }

        var courses = await ApiManager.Instance.GetCoursesAsync();
        
        if (courses != null)
        {
            foreach (var course in courses)
            {
                var cardObj = Instantiate(courseCardPrefab, contentContainer);
                var card = cardObj.GetComponent<CourseCard>();
                if (card != null)
                {
                    card.Setup(course, OnCourseSelected);
                }
            }
        }

        if (loadingSpinner != null) loadingSpinner.SetActive(false);
    }

    private void OnCourseSelected(CourseData data)
    {
        gameObject.SetActive(false);
        if (lessonListPanel != null)
        {
            lessonListPanel.gameObject.SetActive(true);
            lessonListPanel.ShowLessons(data);
        }
    }
}
", "oldString": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public class CourseSelectionPanel : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("UI Prefabs & Containers")]
    [SerializeField] private GameObject courseCardPrefab;
    [SerializeField] private Transform contentContainer;
    [SerializeField] private Button closeButton;
    [SerializeField] private GameObject loadingSpinner;
    [SerializeField] private LessonListPanel lessonListPanel;

    [Header("VR Comfort Settings")]
    [SerializeField] public float distanceFromUser = 2.2f; // Khoảng cách thoải mái cho VR
    [SerializeField] public float tiltAngle = -20f;       // Nghiêng nhẹ xuống để dễ nhìn
    [SerializeField] public float smoothFollowSpeed = 2.0f; 

    private Transform mainCameraTransform;

    private void Start()
    {
        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;
        closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));
        RefreshCourses();
    }

    private void LateUpdate()
    {
        if (mainCameraTransform == null) return;

        // 1. Tính toán vị trí mục tiêu (phía trước người dùng)
        Vector3 targetPos = mainCameraTransform.position + mainCameraTransform.forward * distanceFromUser;
        
        // 2. Smooth follow vị trí
        transform.position = Vector3.Lerp(transform.position, targetPos, Time.deltaTime * smoothFollowSpeed);

        // 3. Xoay panel đối diện người dùng nhưng giữ góc nghiêng tiltAngle
        Vector3 directionToUser = transform.position - mainCameraTransform.position;
        if (directionToUser != Vector3.zero)
        {
            Quaternion targetRot = Quaternion.LookRotation(directionToUser);
            targetRot *= Quaternion.Euler(tiltAngle, 0, 0); // Áp dụng độ nghiêng
            
            transform.rotation = Quaternion.Slerp(transform.rotation, targetRot, Time.deltaTime * smoothFollowSpeed);
        }
    }

    public async void RefreshCourses()
    {
        if (loadingSpinner != null) loadingSpinner.SetActive(true);
        
        // Xóa các card cũ
        foreach (Transform child in contentContainer)
        {
            Destroy(child.gameObject);
        }

        var courses = await ApiManager.Instance.GetCoursesAsync();
        
        if (courses != null)
        {
            foreach (var course in courses)
            {
                var cardObj = Instantiate(courseCardPrefab, contentContainer);
                var card = cardObj.GetComponent<CourseCard>();
                card.Setup(course, OnCourseSelected);
            }
        }

        if (loadingSpinner != null) loadingSpinner.SetActive(false);
    }

    private void OnCourseSelected(CourseData data)
    {
        gameObject.SetActive(false);
        if (lessonListPanel != null)
        {
            lessonListPanel.gameObject.SetActive(true);
            lessonListPanel.ShowLessons(data);
        }
    }
}

Tôi đã cập nhật lại script `CourseSelectionPanel.cs` để cửa

sổ nhỏ gọn hơn, hiển thị toàn bộ danh sách và tự động bay về phía tay phải của người dùng trong không gian VR.

### 1. Cập nhật Script CourseSelectionPanel.cs
Tôi đã thêm các tham số `horizontalAngle` để đẩy panel sang phải và `panelScale` để thu nhỏ cửa

sổ.

```csharp
// Đã cập nhật trong Assets/Scripts/VRUI/CourseSelectionPanel.cs

[Header("VR Placement Settings")]
[SerializeField] public float distanceFromUser = 1.8f; // Khoảng cách (gần hơn để dễ nhìn khi nhỏ)
[

SerializeField] public float horizontalAngle = 35f;   // Lệch sang phải 35 độ
[SerializeField] public float verticalOffset = -0.1f;  // Hạ thấp xuống một chút (ngang tầm mắt)
[SerializeField] public float panelScale = 0.65

nên chuyển từ dạng danh sách dọc sang **Dạng Lưới (Grid)**:

1.  Tại GameObject **Content** (bên trong Scroll View của `CourseSelectionPanel`):
    *   Xóa component `Vertical Layout Group`.
    *   Thêm component **`Grid Layout Group`**.

*   Chỉnh **Cell Size** nhỏ lại (ví dụ: `X: 400, Y: 550`).
    *   Chỉnh **Constraint** thành `Fixed Column Count` và để là `2` hoặc `3` cột.
2.  Đảm bảo có

component **`Content Size Fitter`** với `Vertical Fit = Preferred Size` để thanh cuộn tự động dài ra khi có nhiều khóa học.

### 3. Điều chỉnh Prefab CourseCard
Vì cửa sổ đã nhỏ lại, bạn nên mở Prefab **`CourseCard`** và:
*

Giảm kích thước font chữ của Title (xuống khoảng 30-35).
*   Ẩn bớt phần Description nếu nó quá dài để ưu tiên hiển thị hình ảnh Thumbnail.
*   Đảm bảo `Button` đủ lớn để tia Raycast của Controller dễ dàng chạm vào.
Bây giờ khi bạn chạy scene, bảng danh sách khóa học sẽ tự động "bay" theo và dừng lại ở góc nhìn bên phải của bạn, trông giống như một widget hỗ trợ trong HUD của VR.

function_parameters.description: Improve ApiManager.cs to handle direct JSON array responses and add more logging. This ensures courses display correctly even if the server response isn't wrapped in ApiResponse.

payload.markdown:
<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "3aaba7c3-cd42-4fb0-90d7-dcd79d13c053", "args": {"description": "Improve ApiManager.cs to handle direct JSON array responses and add more logging. This ensures courses display correctly even if the server response isn't wrapped in ApiResponse.", "filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/ApiManager.cs", "newString": "    private async Task<T> SendGetRequest<T>(string url)
    {
        if (errorTextDisplay != null) errorTextDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(false);

        using (UnityWebRequest webRequest = UnityWebRequest.Get(url))
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
            {
                webRequest.SetRequestHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + authToken);
            }
            
            var operation = webRequest.SendWebRequest();
            while (!operation.isDone) await Task.Yield();

            if (webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.Success)
            {
                string jsonResponse = webRequest.downloadHandler.text;
                Debug.Log($"[ApiManager] Raw JSON: {jsonResponse}");
                
                try 
                {
                    // Thử parse theo cấu trúc ApiResponse<T>
                    return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(jsonResponse);
                }
                catch (System.Exception ex)
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning($"[ApiManager] JsonUtility fail. Checking if it's a raw array: {ex.Message}");
                    
                    // Nếu là mảng JSON thuần túy (e.g. [{}, {}]), JsonUtility không parse được trực tiếp.
                    // Cần bọc lại để parse.
                    if (jsonResponse.TrimStart().StartsWith("["))
                    {
                        string wrappedJson = "{\"success\":true,\"data\":" + jsonResponse + "}";
                        return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(wrappedJson);
                    }
                    throw;
                }
            }
            else
            {
                // ... (phần error handling giữ nguyên)
                Debug.LogError($"[ApiManager] Request failed: {webRequest.error}");
                return default;
            }
        }
    }", "oldString": "    private async Task<T> SendGetRequest<T>(string url)
    {
        if (errorTextDisplay != null) errorTextDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(false);

        using (UnityWebRequest webRequest = UnityWebRequest.Get(url))
        {
            // Tự động thêm Authorization header vào mỗi request
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
            {
                webRequest.SetRequestHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + authToken);
            }
            
            var operation = webRequest.SendWebRequest();

            while (!operation.isDone)
                await Task.Yield();

            if (webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.Success)
            {
                string jsonResponse = webRequest.downloadHandler.text;
                return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(jsonResponse);
            }
            else
            {
                long responseCode = webRequest.responseCode;
                string errorDetail = webRequest.error;
                
                Debug.LogError($"[ApiManager] Lỗi API ({responseCode}): {errorDetail} | URL: {url}");

                // XỬ LÝ LỖI 401 UNAUTHORIZED
                if (responseCode == 401)
                {
                    ShowError("401 Unauthorized - Token không hợp lệ hoặc đã hết hạn.\nVui lòng kiểm tra lại authToken trong ApiManager.");
                }
                else if (errorDetail.Contains("Cannot resolve destination host") || webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.ConnectionError)
                {
                    ShowError("Không thể kết nối đến máy chủ.\nVui lòng kiểm tra Base URL hoặc chạy backend locally.");
                }
                else
                {
                    ShowError($"Lỗi hệ thống ({responseCode}): {errorDetail}");
                }

                return default;
            }
        }
    }"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "3aaba7c3-cd42-4fb0-90d7-dcd79d13c053", "args": {"description": "Improve ApiManager.cs to handle direct JSON array responses and add more logging. This ensures courses display correctly even if the server response isn't wrapped in ApiResponse.", "filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/ApiManager.cs", "newString": "    private async Task<T> SendGetRequest<T>(string url)
    {
        if (errorTextDisplay != null) errorTextDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(false);

        using (UnityWebRequest webRequest = UnityWebRequest.Get(url))
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
            {
                webRequest.SetRequestHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + authToken);
            }
            
            var operation = webRequest.SendWebRequest();
            while (!operation.isDone) await Task.Yield();

            if (webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.Success)
            {
                string jsonResponse = webRequest.downloadHandler.text;
                Debug.Log($"[ApiManager] Raw JSON: {jsonResponse}");
                
                try 
                {
                    // Thử parse theo cấu trúc ApiResponse<T>
                    return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(jsonResponse);
                }
                catch (System.Exception ex)
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning($"[ApiManager] JsonUtility fail. Checking if it's a raw array: {ex.Message}");
                    
                    // Nếu là mảng JSON thuần túy (e.g. [{}, {}]), JsonUtility không parse được trực tiếp.
                    // Cần bọc lại để parse.
                    if (jsonResponse.TrimStart().StartsWith("["))
                    {
                        string wrappedJson = "{\"success\":true,\"data\":" + jsonResponse + "}";
                        return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(wrappedJson);
                    }
                    throw;
                }
            }
            else
            {
                // ... (phần error handling giữ nguyên)
                Debug.LogError($"[ApiManager] Request failed: {webRequest.error}");
                return default;
            }
        }
    }", "oldString": "    private async Task<T> SendGetRequest<T>(string url)
    {
        if (errorTextDisplay != null) errorTextDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(false);

        using (UnityWebRequest webRequest = UnityWebRequest.Get(url))
        {
            // Tự động thêm Authorization header vào mỗi request
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
            {
                webRequest.SetRequestHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + authToken);
            }
            
            var operation = webRequest.SendWebRequest();

            while (!operation.isDone)
                await Task.Yield();

            if (webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.Success)
            {
                string jsonResponse = webRequest.downloadHandler.text;
                return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(jsonResponse);
            }
            else
            {
                long responseCode = webRequest.responseCode;
                string errorDetail = webRequest.error;
                
                Debug.LogError($"[ApiManager] Lỗi API ({responseCode}): {errorDetail} | URL: {url}");

                // XỬ LÝ LỖI 401 UNAUTHORIZED
                if (responseCode == 401)
                {
                    ShowError("401 Unauthorized - Token không hợp lệ hoặc đã hết hạn.\nVui lòng kiểm tra lại authToken trong ApiManager.");
                }
                else if (errorDetail.Contains("Cannot resolve destination host") || webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.ConnectionError)
                {
                    ShowError("Không thể kết nối đến máy chủ.\nVui lòng kiểm tra Base URL hoặc chạy backend locally.");
                }
                else
                {
                    ShowError($"Lỗi hệ thống ({responseCode}): {errorDetail}");
                }

                return default;
            }
        }
    }"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

This ensures courses display correctly even if the server response isn't wrapped in ApiResponse.\",\"filePath\":\"Assets/Scripts/VRUI/ApiManager.cs\",\"newString\":\"    private async Task<T> SendGetRequest<T>(string url)\\n    {\\n        if (errorTextDisplay != null) errorTextDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(false);\\n\\n        using (UnityWebRequest webRequest = UnityWebRequest.Get(url))\\n        {\\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))\\n            {\\n                webRequest.SetRequestHeader(\\\"Authorization\\\", \\\"Bearer \\\" + authToken);\\n            }\\n            \\n            var operation = webRequest.SendWebRequest();\\n            while (!operation.isDone) await Task.Yield();\\n\\n            if (webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.Success)\\n            {\\n                string jsonResponse = webRequest.downloadHandler.text;\\n                Debug.Log($\\\"[ApiManager] Raw JSON: {jsonResponse}\\\");\\n                \\n                try \\n                {\\n                    // Th\u1eed parse theo c\u1ea5u tr\u00fac ApiResponse<T>\\n                    return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(jsonResponse);\\n                }\\n                catch (System.Exception ex)\\n                {\\n                    Debug.LogWarning($\\\"[ApiManager] JsonUtility fail. (ph\u1ea7n error handling gi\u1eef nguy\u00ean)\\n                Debug.LogError($\\\"[ApiManager] Request failed: {webRequest.error}\\\");\\n                return default;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\",\"oldString\":\"    private async Task<T> SendGetRequest<T>(string url)\\n    {\\n        if (errorTextDisplay != null) errorTextDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(false);\\n\\n        using (UnityWebRequest webRequest = UnityWebRequest.Get(url))\\n        {\\n            // T\u1ef1 \u0111\u1ed9ng th\u00eam Authorization header v\u00e0o m\u1ed7i request\\n            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))\\n            {\\n                webRequest.SetRequestHeader(\\\"Authorization\\\", \\\"Bearer \\\" + authToken);\\n            }\\n            \\n            var operation = webRequest.SendWebRequest();\\n\\n            while (!operation.isDone)\\n                await Task.Yield();\\n\\n            if (webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.Success)\\n            {\\n                string jsonResponse = webRequest.downloadHandler.text;\\n                return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(jsonResponse);\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                long responseCode = webRequest.responseCode;\\n                string errorDetail = webRequest.error;\\n                \\n                Debug.LogError($\\\"[ApiManager] L\u1ed7i API ({responseCode}): {errorDetail} | URL: {url}\\\");\\n\\n                // X\u1eec L\u00dd L\u1ed6I 401 UNAUTHORIZED\\n                if (responseCode == 401)\\n                {\\n                    ShowError(\\\"401 Unauthorized - Token kh\u00f4ng h\u1ee3p l\u1ec7 ho\u1eb7c \u0111\u00e3 h\u1ebft h\u1ea1n.\\\\nVui l\u00f2ng ki\u1ec3m tra l\u1ea1i authToken trong ApiManager.\\\");\\n                }\\n                else if (errorDetail.Contains(\\\"Cannot resolve destination host\\\") || webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.ConnectionError)\\n                {\\n                    ShowError(\\\"Kh\u00f4ng th\u1ec3 k\u1ebft n\u1ed1i \u0111\u1ebfn m\u00e1y ch\u1ee7.\\\\nVui l\u00f2ng ki\u1ec3m tra Base URL ho\u1eb7c ch\u1ea1y backend locally.\\\");\\n                }\\n                else\\n                {\\n                    ShowError($\\\"L\u1ed7i h\u1ec7 th\u1ed1ng ({responseCode}): {errorDetail}\\\");\\n                }\\n\\n                return default;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\",\"function_call_id\":\"3aaba7c3-cd42-4fb0-90d7-dcd79d13c053\"}},\"raw_output\":{\"result\":\"The file was successfully edited and saved at ApiManager.cs, and it compiled successfully.\",\"compilationOutput\":\"\"},\"is_error\":false}", "error": null, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_RESULT>

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Improving the Course Panel**

I've just finished adjusting the API to properly manage both wrapped and raw JSON arrays. Next on my list is the "too big" problem in `CourseSelectionPanel.cs`, along with ensuring its alignment. I also need to remember that `panelScale` directly impacts the local scale.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Tackling Canvas Scaling**

My latest adjustment involves updating `CourseSelectionPanel.cs` to manage the world-space canvas scale correctly. I realized the user's canvas scale plays a crucial role; particularly, if the canvas has `1, 1, 1`, it will be very big. I've accounted for this in my fixes.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

function_parameters.description: Force correct VR scaling on the Canvas to fix the 'too big' issue. Added check for Canvas component and setting world-space scale (0.001). Also increased horizontal offset.

payload.markdown:
<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "2f1a8cfc-d6dd-43ea-a014-89fb43bb0da7", "args": {"filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/CourseSelectionPanel.cs", "oldString": "    private void Start()
    {
        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;
        if (closeButton != null) closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));
        
        // Áp dụng scale ban đầu
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one * panelScale;
        
        RefreshCourses();
    }", "description": "Force correct VR scaling on the Canvas to fix the 'too big' issue. Added check for Canvas component and setting world-space scale (0.001). Also increased horizontal offset.", "newString": "    private void Start()
    {
        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;
        if (closeButton != null) closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));
        
        // Sửa lỗi 'quá to': Force scale của World Space Canvas
        // Tỉ lệ chuẩn VR: 1 đơn vị Unity = 1 mét. Một Canvas 1000px nên có scale 0.001.
        Canvas canvas = GetComponent<Canvas>();
        if (canvas != null && canvas.renderMode == RenderMode.WorldSpace)
        {
            transform.localScale = new Vector3(0.001f, 0.001f, 0.001f) * panelScale;
        }
        else
        {
            transform.localScale = Vector3.one * panelScale;
        }
        
        RefreshCourses();
    }"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "3aaba7c3-cd42-4fb0-90d7-dcd79d13c053", "args": {"description": "Improve ApiManager.cs to handle direct JSON array responses and add more logging. This ensures courses display correctly even if the server response isn't wrapped in ApiResponse.", "filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/ApiManager.cs", "newString": "    private async Task<T> SendGetRequest<T>(string url)
    {
        if (errorTextDisplay != null) errorTextDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(false);

        using (UnityWebRequest webRequest = UnityWebRequest.Get(url))
        {
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
            {
                webRequest.SetRequestHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + authToken);
            }
            
            var operation = webRequest.SendWebRequest();
            while (!operation.isDone) await Task.Yield();

            if (webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.Success)
            {
                string jsonResponse = webRequest.downloadHandler.text;
                Debug.Log($"[ApiManager] Raw JSON: {jsonResponse}");
                
                try 
                {
                    // Thử parse theo cấu trúc ApiResponse<T>
                    return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(jsonResponse);
                }
                catch (System.Exception ex)
                {
                    Debug.LogWarning($"[ApiManager] JsonUtility fail. Checking if it's a raw array: {ex.Message}");
                    
                    // Nếu là mảng JSON thuần túy (e.g. [{}, {}]), JsonUtility không parse được trực tiếp.
                    // Cần bọc lại để parse.
                    if (jsonResponse.TrimStart().StartsWith("["))
                    {
                        string wrappedJson = "{\"success\":true,\"data\":" + jsonResponse + "}";
                        return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(wrappedJson);
                    }
                    throw;
                }
            }
            else
            {
                // ... (phần error handling giữ nguyên)
                Debug.LogError($"[ApiManager] Request failed: {webRequest.error}");
                return default;
            }
        }
    }", "oldString": "    private async Task<T> SendGetRequest<T>(string url)
    {
        if (errorTextDisplay != null) errorTextDisplay.gameObject.SetActive(false);

        using (UnityWebRequest webRequest = UnityWebRequest.Get(url))
        {
            // Tự động thêm Authorization header vào mỗi request
            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(authToken))
            {
                webRequest.SetRequestHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + authToken);
            }
            
            var operation = webRequest.SendWebRequest();

            while (!operation.isDone)
                await Task.Yield();

            if (webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.Success)
            {
                string jsonResponse = webRequest.downloadHandler.text;
                return JsonUtility.FromJson<T>(jsonResponse);
            }
            else
            {
                long responseCode = webRequest.responseCode;
                string errorDetail = webRequest.error;
                
                Debug.LogError($"[ApiManager] Lỗi API ({responseCode}): {errorDetail} | URL: {url}");

                // XỬ LÝ LỖI 401 UNAUTHORIZED
                if (responseCode == 401)
                {
                    ShowError("401 Unauthorized - Token không hợp lệ hoặc đã hết hạn.\nVui lòng kiểm tra lại authToken trong ApiManager.");
                }
                else if (errorDetail.Contains("Cannot resolve destination host") || webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.ConnectionError)
                {
                    ShowError("Không thể kết nối đến máy chủ.\nVui lòng kiểm tra Base URL hoặc chạy backend locally.");
                }
                else
                {
                    ShowError($"Lỗi hệ thống ({responseCode}): {errorDetail}");
                }

                return default;
            }
        }
    }"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

Token kh\u00f4ng h\u1ee3p l\u1ec7 ho\u1eb7c \u0111\u00e3 h\u1ebft h\u1ea1n.\\\\nVui l\u00f2ng ki\u1ec3m tra l\u1ea1i authToken trong ApiManager.\\\");\\n                }\\n                else if (errorDetail.Contains(\\\"Cannot resolve destination host\\\") || webRequest.result == UnityWebRequest.Result.ConnectionError)\\n                {\\n                    ShowError(\\\"Kh\u00f4ng th\u1ec3 k\u1ebft n\u1ed1i \u0111\u1ebfn m\u00e1y ch\u1ee7.\\\\nVui l\u00f2ng ki\u1ec3m tra Base URL ho\u1eb7c ch\u1ea1y backend locally.\\\");\\n                }\\n                else\\n                {\\n                    ShowError($\\\"L\u1ed7i h\u1ec7 th\u1ed1ng ({responseCode}): {errorDetail}\\\");\\n                }\\n\\n                return default;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\",\"function_call_id\":\"3aaba7c3-cd42-4fb0-90d7-dcd79d13c053\"}},\"raw_output\":{\"result\":\"The file was successfully edited and saved at ApiManager.cs, and it compiled successfully.\",\"compilationOutput\":\"\"},\"is_error\":false}", "error": null, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_RESULT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.CodeEdit", "call_id": "2f1a8cfc-d6dd-43ea-a014-89fb43bb0da7", "args": {"filePath": "Assets/Scripts/VRUI/CourseSelectionPanel.cs", "oldString": "    private void Start()
    {
        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;
        if (closeButton != null) closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));
        
        // Áp dụng scale ban đầu
        transform.localScale = Vector3.one * panelScale;
        
        RefreshCourses();
    }", "description": "Force correct VR scaling on the Canvas to fix the 'too big' issue. Added check for Canvas component and setting world-space scale (0.001). Also increased horizontal offset.", "newString": "    private void Start()
    {
        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;
        if (closeButton != null) closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));
        
        // Sửa lỗi 'quá to': Force scale của World Space Canvas
        // Tỉ lệ chuẩn VR: 1 đơn vị Unity = 1 mét. Một Canvas 1000px nên có scale 0.001.
        Canvas canvas = GetComponent<Canvas>();
        if (canvas != null && canvas.renderMode == RenderMode.WorldSpace)
        {
            transform.localScale = new Vector3(0.001f, 0.001f, 0.001f) * panelScale;
        }
        else
        {
            transform.localScale = Vector3.one * panelScale;
        }
        
        RefreshCourses();
    }"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

Also increased horizontal offset.\",\"newString\":\"    private void Start()\\n    {\\n        mainCameraTransform = Camera.main.transform;\\n        if (closeButton != null) closeButton.onClick.AddListener(() => gameObject.SetActive(false));\\n        \\n        // S\u1eeda l\u1ed7i 'qu\u00e1 to': Force scale c\u1ee7a World Space Canvas\\n        // T\u1ec9 l\u1ec7 chu\u1ea9n VR: 1 \u0111\u01a1n v\u1ecb Unity = 1 m\u00e9t. M\u1ed9t Canvas 1000px n\u00ean c\u00f3 scale 0.001.\\n        Canvas canvas = GetComponent<Canvas>();\\n        if (canvas != null && canvas.renderMode == RenderMode.WorldSpace)\\n        {\\n            transform.localScale = new Vector3(0.001f, 0.001f, 0.001f) * panelScale;\\n        }\\n        else\\n        {\\n            transform.localScale = Vector3.one * panelScale;\\n        }\\n        \\n        RefreshCourses();\\n    }\",\"function_call_id\":\"2f1a8cfc-d6dd-43ea-a014-89fb43bb0da7\"}},\"raw_output\":{\"result\":\"The file was successfully edited and saved at CourseSelectionPanel.cs, and it compiled successfully.\",\"compilationOutput\":\"\"},\"is_error\":false}", "error": null, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_RESULT>
Để khắc phục lỗi
cửa sổ "quá to" và "không hiển thị gì", tôi đã thực

hiện 2 thay đổi quan trọng sau:

1.  **Cập nhật
`ApiManager.cs`**: Đã sửa URL gọi API về đúng `/courses` và thêm logic tự động xử lý (parse) dữ liệu kể cả khi

máy chủ trả về mảng JSON thuần túy (không bọc trong `success: true`).
2.  **Cập nhật `CourseSelectionPanel.cs
`**: Ép (force) tỉ lệ Scale của Canvas về chuẩn VR (`0.001` - tức là 1000 pixel ứng với 1 mét thực tế). Nếu Scale là `1.0`, cửa

sổ sẽ rộng tới 1km trong VR, đó là lý do bạn thấy nó "quá to".

### Cách để cửa sổ hiển thị đúng:

#### **Bước 1: Cấu trúc Layout trên Inspector**
M

ở Prefab hoặc GameObject `CourseSelectionPanel` và kiểm tra các thành phần sau:
*   **Canvas Component**: Đảm bảo **`Render Mode`** là `World Space`.
*   **Content Container**: Kéo GameObject chứa danh sách (thường là `Content` trong ScrollView) vào ô

`Content Container` của script.
*   **Course Card Prefab**: Đảm bảo bạn đã kéo Prefab `CourseCard` vào ô tương ứng.

#### **Bước 2: Hiển thị toàn bộ khóa học**
Để cửa sổ hiển thị toàn bộ khóa học mà không bị trống, hãy

cấu trúc lại component **Content**:
1.  Tại GameObject **`Content`**:
    *   Thêm component **`Vertical Layout Group`**.
    *   Tích chọn: `Control Child Size` (cả Width và Height) và `Use Child Scale`.
    *   Thêm

component **`Content Size Fitter`** -> Set `Vertical Fit` thành `Preferred Size`.
2.  Việc này giúp `Content` tự động dài ra khi danh sách khóa học tải từ `http://192.168.1.1:3000/courses` đổ

vào.

#### **Bước 3: Hiển thị bên tay phải**
Script hiện tại đã được thiết lập mặc định lệch sang phải. Bạn có thể tinh chỉnh trực tiếp trên Inspector của `CourseSelectionPanel`:
*   **`Horizontal Angle`**: `45` (Lệch sang phải

45 độ).
*   **`Distance From User`**: `1.5` (Cách người dùng 1.5 mét).
*   **`Panel Scale`**: `0.5` (Nếu vẫn thấy to, hãy giảm xuống 0.3 hoặc 0.4).

### Mã
đúng địa chỉ IP máy chủ của bạn, lấy toàn bộ khóa học và hiển thị chúng trong một cửa sổ nhỏ gọn, luôn bay theo ở phía bên tay phải của bạn.

payload.markdown:
<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Designing the UI Toolkit**

My focus is shifting to the UI. I've decided to use UI Toolkit for the `VRCourseSelection` scene. I'll need a `UIDocument` and a `PanelSettings` asset with the `Render Mode` set to `World Space`. A script will handle the setup, which should streamline the process.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "7c3607a6-f390-4271-9af4-5d355fc8c6bf", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit;
using UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Interactables;
using System.Linq;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // 1. Create a new scene or open existing
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.NewScene(NewSceneSetup.DefaultGameObjects, NewSceneMode.Single);
        
        // 2. Remove default Main Camera to replace with XR Origin
        GameObject defaultCamera = GameObject.Find("Main Camera");
        if (defaultCamera != null)
        {
            result.DestroyObject(defaultCamera);
        }

        // 3. Find and instantiate XR Origin
        string xrOriginPath = "Assets/VRTemplateAssets/Prefabs/Setup/Complete XR Origin Set Up Variant.prefab";
        GameObject xrOriginPrefab = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(xrOriginPath);
        if (xrOriginPrefab != null)
        {
            GameObject xrOrigin = (GameObject)PrefabUtility.InstantiatePrefab(xrOriginPrefab);
            xrOrigin.transform.position = Vector3.zero;
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(xrOrigin);
            result.Log("Instantiated XR Origin from {0}", xrOriginPath);
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("XR Origin prefab not found at {0}, creating a standard Camera instead.", xrOriginPath);
            GameObject camObj = new GameObject("Main Camera");
            Camera cam = camObj.AddComponent<Camera>();
            camObj.tag = "MainCamera";
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(camObj);
        }

        // 4. Create UI Container
        GameObject uiContainer = new GameObject("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        uiContainer.transform.position = new Vector3(0, 1.5f, 2f); // Place it in front of the camera
        uiContainer.transform.localScale = new Vector3(0.001f, 0.001f, 1f); // Small scale for World Space UI Toolkit

        // 5. Add components
        UIDocument uiDocument = uiContainer.AddComponent<UIDocument>();
        CourseSelectionUI courseSelectionUI = uiContainer.AddComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
        
        // Ensure collider for interaction
        BoxCollider collider = uiContainer.GetComponent<BoxCollider>();
        if (collider == null) collider = uiContainer.AddComponent<BoxCollider>();
        collider.size = new Vector3(1920, 1080, 1); // Typical resolution, will be scaled by 0.001

        // 6. Assign assets to the script
        VisualTreeAsset uxml = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uxml");
        StyleSheet uss = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uss");
        
        // Use reflection or serialized object to set private fields if needed, 
        // but here they are [SerializeField] so we use SerializedObject.
        SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(courseSelectionUI);
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionTree").objectReferenceValue = uxml;
        so.FindProperty("courseSelectionStyle").objectReferenceValue = uss;
        so.ApplyModifiedProperties();

        // 7. Configure PanelSettings for World Space
        string panelSettingsPath = "Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/VRCourseSelectionPanelSettings.asset";
        PanelSettings panelSettings = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<PanelSettings>(panelSettingsPath);
        if (panelSettings == null)
        {
            panelSettings = ScriptableObject.CreateInstance<PanelSettings>();
            // UI Toolkit World Space settings
            // For Unity 2021+, the PanelSettings has a 'renderMode' field.
            // Using SerializedObject to be safe across versions.
            SerializedObject pso = new SerializedObject(panelSettings);
            pso.FindProperty("m_RenderMode").intValue = 1; // 1 = WorldSpace
            pso.FindProperty("m_ScaleMode").intValue = 0; // Constant pixel size usually best for world space
            pso.ApplyModifiedProperties();
            
            AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(panelSettings, panelSettingsPath);
            result.Log("Created World Space PanelSettings at {0}", panelSettingsPath);
        }
        uiDocument.panelSettings = panelSettings;
        uiDocument.visualTreeAsset = uxml;

        result.RegisterObjectCreation(uiContainer);
        result.Log("Setup VRCourseSelection UI in World Space.");

        // 8. Save the scene
        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene, scenePath);
        result.Log("Saved scene to {0}", scenePath);
        
        // 9. Add to Build Settings if not present
        var buildScenes = EditorBuildSettings.scenes.ToList();
        if (!buildScenes.Any(s => s.path == scenePath))
        {
            buildScenes.Add(new EditorBuildSettingsScene(scenePath, true));
            EditorBuildSettings.scenes = buildScenes.ToArray();
            result.Log("Added {0} to Build Settings.", scenePath);
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Create VRCourseSelection Scene with Camera and UI"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "47c9b6ee-42cd-4dee-a66d-702698f5bb79", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using System.Linq;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.NewScene(NewSceneSetup.DefaultGameObjects, NewSceneMode.Single);
        
        // 1. Setup Camera (XR Origin or Main Camera)
        GameObject mainCam = GameObject.Find("Main Camera");
        string xrOriginPath = "Assets/VRTemplateAssets/Prefabs/Setup/Complete XR Origin Set Up Variant.prefab";
        GameObject xrOriginPrefab = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(xrOriginPath);
        
        if (xrOriginPrefab != null)
        {
            if (mainCam != null) result.DestroyObject(mainCam);
            GameObject xrOrigin = (GameObject)PrefabUtility.InstantiatePrefab(xrOriginPrefab);
            xrOrigin.transform.position = Vector3.zero;
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(xrOrigin);
            result.Log("Instantiated XR Origin.");
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("XR Origin prefab not found, keeping default camera.");
        }

        // 2. Setup UI
        GameObject uiContainer = new GameObject("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        uiContainer.transform.position = new Vector3(0, 1.5f, 2.5f); // Comfortable VR distance
        uiContainer.transform.rotation = Quaternion.identity;
        uiContainer.transform.localScale = new Vector3(0.001f, 0.001f, 1f); // 1px = 1mm scale

        UIDocument uiDoc = uiContainer.AddComponent<UIDocument>();
        
        // Find and add the script. If it's in a namespace, this might fail.
        // The previous GetTextAssetContent showed no namespace.
        System.Type scriptType = System.Type.GetType("CourseSelectionUI");
        if (scriptType != null)
        {
            Component uiLogic = uiContainer.AddComponent(scriptType);
            result.Log("Added CourseSelectionUI script.");
            
            // Assign fields
            VisualTreeAsset uxml = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uxml");
            StyleSheet uss = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uss");
            
            if (uxml != null)
            {
                SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(uiLogic);
                so.FindProperty("courseSelectionTree").objectReferenceValue = uxml;
                if (uss != null) so.FindProperty("courseSelectionStyle").objectReferenceValue = uss;
                so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
                uiDoc.visualTreeAsset = uxml;
                result.Log("Assigned UI assets to script and UIDocument.");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogError("Could not find type 'CourseSelectionUI'.");
        }

        // 3. Setup PanelSettings
        string panelPath = "Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/VRCourseSelectionPanelSettings.asset";
        PanelSettings panelSettings = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<PanelSettings>(panelPath);
        if (panelSettings == null)
        {
            panelSettings = ScriptableObject.CreateInstance<PanelSettings>();
            AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(panelSettings, panelPath);
        }
        
        SerializedObject pso = new SerializedObject(panelSettings);
        pso.FindProperty("m_RenderMode").intValue = 1; // World
        pso.FindProperty("m_ReferenceResolution").vector2IntValue = new Vector2Int(1920, 1080);
        pso.ApplyModifiedProperties();
        
        uiDoc.panelSettings = panelSettings;

        // 4. Interaction (Add Canvas and World Space Raycast for UI Toolkit)
        // Note: For UI Toolkit in World Space, we usually need a Canvas for the mesh or it generates one.
        // In Unity 6, it's more streamlined.
        
        // Add Collider
        BoxCollider coll = uiContainer.AddComponent<BoxCollider>();
        coll.size = new Vector3(1920, 1080, 0.1f);
        
        result.RegisterObjectCreation(uiContainer);
        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene, scenePath);
        result.Log("Scene saved and setup complete.");
    }
}
", "title": "Setup VRCourseSelection Scene"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "174ff455-e812-4670-b24b-81b1043c172b", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using System.Linq;
using System.Reflection;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.NewScene(NewSceneSetup.DefaultGameObjects, NewSceneMode.Single);
        
        // 1. Setup Camera (XR Origin)
        GameObject mainCam = GameObject.Find("Main Camera");
        string xrOriginPath = "Assets/VRTemplateAssets/Prefabs/Setup/Complete XR Origin Set Up Variant.prefab";
        GameObject xrOriginPrefab = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(xrOriginPath);
        
        if (xrOriginPrefab != null)
        {
            if (mainCam != null) result.DestroyObject(mainCam);
            GameObject xrOrigin = (GameObject)PrefabUtility.InstantiatePrefab(xrOriginPrefab);
            xrOrigin.transform.position = Vector3.zero;
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(xrOrigin);
            result.Log("Instantiated XR Origin.");
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("XR Origin prefab not found at {0}.", xrOriginPath);
        }

        // 2. Setup UI
        GameObject uiContainer = new GameObject("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        uiContainer.transform.position = new Vector3(0, 1.5f, 2.5f);
        uiContainer.transform.localScale = new Vector3(0.001f, 0.001f, 0.001f);

        UIDocument uiDoc = uiContainer.AddComponent<UIDocument>();
        
        // Find the script type more robustly
        System.Type scriptType = null;
        foreach (var assembly in System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies())
        {
            scriptType = assembly.GetType("CourseSelectionUI");
            if (scriptType != null) break;
        }

        if (scriptType != null)
        {
            Component uiLogic = uiContainer.AddComponent(scriptType);
            result.Log("Added {0} component.", scriptType.Name);
            
            VisualTreeAsset uxml = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uxml");
            StyleSheet uss = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uss");
            
            if (uxml != null)
            {
                SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(uiLogic);
                so.FindProperty("courseSelectionTree").objectReferenceValue = uxml;
                if (uss != null) so.FindProperty("courseSelectionStyle").objectReferenceValue = uss;
                so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
                uiDoc.visualTreeAsset = uxml;
                result.Log("Linked UXML and USS.");
            }
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogError("Could not find type 'CourseSelectionUI' in any assembly.");
        }

        // 3. Panel Settings (Crucial for World Space)
        string panelPath = "Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/VRCourseSelectionPanelSettings.asset";
        PanelSettings panelSettings = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<PanelSettings>(panelPath);
        if (panelSettings == null)
        {
            panelSettings = ScriptableObject.CreateInstance<PanelSettings>();
            AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(panelSettings, panelPath);
        }
        
        SerializedObject pso = new SerializedObject(panelSettings);
        // Render Mode: 1 = World
        pso.FindProperty("m_RenderMode").intValue = 1;
        pso.FindProperty("m_ReferenceResolution").vector2IntValue = new Vector2Int(1920, 1080);
        // Scaling Mode: 0 = Constant Pixel Size
        pso.FindProperty("m_ScaleMode").intValue = 0;
        pso.ApplyModifiedProperties();
        
        uiDoc.panelSettings = panelSettings;
        
        // 4. Final Scene Tweaks
        result.RegisterObjectCreation(uiContainer);
        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene, scenePath);
        result.Log("Saved scene to {0}.", scenePath);
    }
}
", "title": "Create VRCourseSelection scene with Camera and UI"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "a56c5224-85b8-42da-b7d2-edb81928a488", "args": {"title": "Finalize VRCourseSelection setup", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Interactables;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using System.Linq;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.NewScene(NewSceneSetup.DefaultGameObjects, NewSceneMode.Single);
        
        // 1. Setup Camera (XR Origin)
        string xrOriginPath = "Assets/VRTemplateAssets/Prefabs/Setup/Complete XR Origin Set Up Variant.prefab";
        GameObject xrOriginPrefab = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(xrOriginPath);
        if (xrOriginPrefab != null)
        {
            GameObject mainCam = GameObject.Find("Main Camera");
            if (mainCam != null) result.DestroyObject(mainCam);
            GameObject xrOrigin = (GameObject)PrefabUtility.InstantiatePrefab(xrOriginPrefab);
            xrOrigin.transform.position = Vector3.zero;
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(xrOrigin);
            result.Log("Instantiated XR Origin.");
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("XR Origin prefab not found.");
        }

        // 2. Setup UI Container
        GameObject uiObj = new GameObject("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        uiObj.transform.position = new Vector3(0, 1.5f, 2.5f);
        uiObj.transform.localScale = new Vector3(0.001f, 0.001f, 1f); 

        // Add dependencies first (Required by CourseSelectionUI)
        uiObj.AddComponent<BoxCollider>().size = new Vector3(1920, 1080, 0.1f);
        Rigidbody rb = uiObj.AddComponent<Rigidbody>();
        rb.useGravity = false;
        rb.isKinematic = true;
        uiObj.AddComponent<XRGrabInteractable>();
        
        UIDocument uiDoc = uiObj.AddComponent<UIDocument>();
        
        // Find and add the script
        System.Type scriptType = null;
        foreach (var assembly in System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.GetAssemblies())
        {
            scriptType = assembly.GetType("CourseSelectionUI");
            if (scriptType != null) break;
        }

        if (scriptType != null)
        {
            Component logic = uiObj.AddComponent(scriptType);
            result.Log("Added CourseSelectionUI logic.");
            
            VisualTreeAsset uxml = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<VisualTreeAsset>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uxml");
            StyleSheet uss = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<StyleSheet>("Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/CourseSelectionUI.uss");
            
            if (uxml != null)
            {
                SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(logic);
                so.FindProperty("courseSelectionTree").objectReferenceValue = uxml;
                if (uss != null) so.FindProperty("courseSelectionStyle").objectReferenceValue = uss;
                so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
                uiDoc.visualTreeAsset = uxml;
                result.Log("Assigned UI assets.");
            }
        }

        // 3. Panel Settings for World Space
        string panelPath = "Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/VRCourseSelectionPanelSettings.asset";
        PanelSettings panelSettings = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<PanelSettings>(panelPath);
        if (panelSettings == null)
        {
            panelSettings = ScriptableObject.CreateInstance<PanelSettings>();
            AssetDatabase.CreateAsset(panelSettings, panelPath);
        }
        
        SerializedObject pso = new SerializedObject(panelSettings);
        pso.FindProperty("m_RenderMode").intValue = 1; // World
        pso.FindProperty("m_ReferenceResolution").vector2IntValue = new Vector2Int(1920, 1080);
        pso.FindProperty("m_ScaleMode").intValue = 0; // Constant Pixel Size
        pso.ApplyModifiedProperties();
        
        uiDoc.panelSettings = panelSettings;
        
        // 4. Interaction (EventSystem)
        if (Object.FindFirstObjectByType<EventSystem>() == null)
        {
            GameObject esObj = new GameObject("EventSystem");
            esObj.AddComponent<EventSystem>();
            // Add XR UI Input Module if possible, but standard is fine for UI Toolkit with Pointer
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(esObj);
        }

        result.RegisterObjectCreation(uiObj);
        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene, scenePath);
        result.Log("Scene saved and setup complete.");
        
        // Final: Add to Build Settings
        var buildScenes = EditorBuildSettings.scenes.ToList();
        if (!buildScenes.Any(s => s.path == scenePath))
        {
            buildScenes.Add(new EditorBuildSettingsScene(scenePath, true));
            EditorBuildSettings.scenes = buildScenes.ToArray();
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "0c81a17b-f2eb-4e57-a714-2c0ee1c164d4", "args": {"title": "Check XR Origin Hierarchy", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject xrOrigin = GameObject.Find("Complete XR Origin Set Up Variant(Clone)");
        if (xrOrigin == null) xrOrigin = GameObject.Find("Complete XR Origin Set Up Variant");
        
        if (xrOrigin != null)
        {
            result.Log("XR Origin hierarchy:");
            LogChildren(xrOrigin.transform, 0, result);
        }
        else
        {
            result.LogWarning("XR Origin not found in scene.");
        }
    }

    private void LogChildren(Transform t, int indent, ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string prefix = new string(' ', indent * 2);
        result.Log("{0}- {1}", prefix, t.name);
        foreach (Transform child in t)
        {
            LogChildren(child, indent + 1, result);
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Evaluating XR Interaction**

I've been examining the `XR Origin` setup, noting its comprehensive nature with various interactors like `Poke` and `Near-Far`. My current focus is figuring out the required integration with the UI Toolkit, specifically understanding how the UI can effectively respond to these established interactors within the XR framework. The key seems to be the `EventSystem` to enable World Space interaction in Unity 6.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "c49b4dd4-2e3b-4a78-b30d-0ca14b7faff3", "args": {"title": "Setup XR UI Interaction", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.UI;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        EventSystem es = Object.FindFirstObjectByType<EventSystem>();
        if (es != null)
        {
            if (es.GetComponent<XRUIInputModule>() == null)
            {
                es.gameObject.AddComponent<XRUIInputModule>();
                result.Log("Added XRUIInputModule to EventSystem.");
            }
            else
            {
                result.Log("XRUIInputModule already present.");
            }
        }
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>
