payload.markdown:
<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Considering UI First**

I've decided to prioritize a 2D overlay UI for the `VRCourseSelection`. This approach facilitates quicker editing and testing compared to working directly in a VR world space environment. I'm focusing on adapting the existing scene to accommodate this standard 2D overlay.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

data.message: Cloud->Relay:  {"$type":"CHAT_RESPONSE_V1","message_id":"0456ef7d-21eb-48ce-a99d-ad2c10e8f629","last_message":false,"markdown":"<THOUGHT>{\"content\": \"**Adapting the Scene**\\n\\nI'm now implementing the UI adjust...

payload.markdown:
<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Adapting the Scene**

I'm now implementing the UI adjustments. The existing VR-specific components and scale transforms are being removed. Additionally, I'm ensuring a standard `Main Camera` is in place, even though an overlay UI doesn't strictly depend on it. ScreenSpace (Overlay) has been implemented in the `PanelSettings`.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "98b228ee-a1c3-4383-ad99-30bcbf563302", "args": {"title": "Switch to 2D UI Overlay Mode", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using System.Linq;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath);

        // 1. Remove XR Origin if exists and add a standard Main Camera
        GameObject xrOrigin = GameObject.Find("Complete XR Origin Set Up Variant");
        if (xrOrigin != null) result.DestroyObject(xrOrigin);

        if (GameObject.FindWithTag("MainCamera") == null)
        {
            GameObject camObj = new GameObject("Main Camera");
            camObj.tag = "MainCamera";
            Camera cam = camObj.AddComponent<Camera>();
            cam.backgroundColor = Color.black;
            cam.clearFlags = CameraClearFlags.SolidColor;
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(camObj);
            result.Log("Created standard Main Camera.");
        }

        // 2. Adjust UI Container for 2D Overlay
        GameObject uiObj = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (uiObj != null)
        {
            result.RegisterObjectModification(uiObj.transform);
            uiObj.transform.position = Vector3.zero;
            uiObj.transform.rotation = Quaternion.identity;
            uiObj.transform.localScale = Vector3.one;

            // Remove VR-specific components for 2D testing
            var grab = uiObj.GetComponent<UnityEngine.XR.Interaction.Toolkit.Interactables.XRGrabInteractable>();
            if (grab != null) result.DestroyObject(grab);
            
            var rb = uiObj.GetComponent<Rigidbody>();
            if (rb != null) result.DestroyObject(rb);
            
            var coll = uiObj.GetComponent<BoxCollider>();
            if (coll != null) result.DestroyObject(coll);
            
            result.Log("Cleaned up VR components for 2D UI testing.");
        }

        // 3. Update PanelSettings to ScreenSpace Overlay
        string panelPath = "Assets/UI/VRCourseSelection/VRCourseSelectionPanelSettings.asset";
        PanelSettings panelSettings = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<PanelSettings>(panelPath);
        if (panelSettings != null)
        {
            SerializedObject pso = new SerializedObject(panelSettings);
            // Render Mode: 0 = ScreenSpaceOverlay
            pso.FindProperty("m_RenderMode").intValue = 0;
            pso.FindProperty("m_ScaleMode").intValue = 1; // Scale With Screen Size
            pso.FindProperty("m_ReferenceResolution").vector2IntValue = new Vector2Int(1920, 1080);
            pso.ApplyModifiedProperties();
            result.Log("Updated PanelSettings to ScreenSpace Overlay.");
        }

        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene);
        result.Log("Scene updated for 2D UI development.");
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "60868367-20cc-4cfb-b126-6b22dae56860", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEditor;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        GameObject uiObj = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (uiObj == null)
        {
            result.LogError("VRCourseSelectionUI object not found.");
            return;
        }

        UIDocument doc = uiObj.GetComponent<UIDocument>();
        if (doc == null)
        {
            result.LogError("UIDocument not found on VRCourseSelectionUI.");
            return;
        }

        result.Log("UIDocument Status:");
        result.Log("- Enabled: {0}", doc.enabled);
        result.Log("- VisualTreeAsset: {0}", doc.visualTreeAsset != null ? doc.visualTreeAsset.name : "None");
        result.Log("- PanelSettings: {0}", doc.panelSettings != null ? doc.panelSettings.name : "None");
        
        if (doc.panelSettings != null)
        {
            result.Log("- PanelSettings Render Mode: {0}", doc.panelSettings.renderMode);
        }
    }
}
", "title": "Verify UI Configuration"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "dc9954cf-6fcc-400d-b3e8-87596e71e39d", "args": {"title": "Initialize App Logic and Scripts", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEngine.InputSystem.UI;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // 1. Setup ApiManager
        if (Object.FindFirstObjectByType<ApiManager>() == null)
        {
            GameObject apiManagerObj = new GameObject("[ApiManager]");
            apiManagerObj.AddComponent<ApiManager>();
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(apiManagerObj);
            result.Log("Added ApiManager to the scene.");
        }
        else
        {
            result.Log("ApiManager already exists.");
        }

        // 2. Setup EventSystem for New Input System
        EventSystem es = Object.FindFirstObjectByType<EventSystem>();
        if (es == null)
        {
            GameObject esObj = new GameObject("EventSystem");
            es = esObj.AddComponent<EventSystem>();
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(esObj);
        }

        // Replace XRUIInputModule or StandaloneInputModule with InputSystemUIInputModule for better 2D/3D compatibility in New Input System
        var oldModules = es.GetComponents<BaseInputModule>();
        foreach (var mod in oldModules)
        {
            if (!(mod is InputSystemUIInputModule))
            {
                result.DestroyObject(mod);
            }
        }

        if (es.GetComponent<InputSystemUIInputModule>() == null)
        {
            es.gameObject.AddComponent<InputSystemUIInputModule>();
            result.Log("Configured EventSystem with InputSystemUIInputModule.");
        }

        // 3. Configure CourseSelectionUI fields
        GameObject uiObj = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (uiObj != null)
        {
            CourseSelectionUI script = uiObj.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
            if (script != null)
            {
                SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(script);
                
                // Link scroll action if not set
                var scrollProp = so.FindProperty("scrollAxisAction");
                if (scrollProp.objectReferenceValue == null)
                {
                    // Find a suitable scroll action reference
                    string scrollPath = "Assets/Samples/XR Interaction Toolkit/3.3.0/Starter Assets/XRI Default Input Actions.inputactions/XRI Right Interaction/UI Scroll";
                    InputActionReference scrollRef = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<InputActionReference>(scrollPath);
                    if (scrollRef != null)
                    {
                        scrollProp.objectReferenceValue = scrollRef;
                        result.Log("Linked scrollAxisAction to {0}", scrollPath);
                    }
                }

                // Ensure vrClassroomSceneName is set (defaulting to VRClassroom if empty)
                var sceneNameProp = so.FindProperty("vrClassroomSceneName");
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(sceneNameProp.stringValue))
                {
                    sceneNameProp.stringValue = "VRClassroom";
                }

                so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
            }
        }
        
        result.Log("Application logic initialized.");
    }
}
"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "5218e0d4-718b-4ead-a1ac-80272db4b9be", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEngine.UIElements;
using UnityEngine.InputSystem;
using UnityEngine.InputSystem.UI;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // 1. Setup ApiManager
        if (Object.FindFirstObjectByType<ApiManager>() == null)
        {
            GameObject apiManagerObj = new GameObject("[ApiManager]");
            apiManagerObj.AddComponent<ApiManager>();
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(apiManagerObj);
            result.Log("Added ApiManager to the scene.");
        }

        // 2. Setup EventSystem
        GameObject esObj = GameObject.Find("EventSystem");
        if (esObj == null)
        {
            esObj = new GameObject("EventSystem");
            esObj.AddComponent<EventSystem>();
            result.RegisterObjectCreation(esObj);
        }

        if (esObj.GetComponent<InputSystemUIInputModule>() == null)
        {
            // Remove old modules
            var old = esObj.GetComponents<BaseInputModule>();
            foreach (var mod in old) result.DestroyObject(mod);
            
            esObj.AddComponent<InputSystemUIInputModule>();
            result.Log("Configured EventSystem with InputSystemUIInputModule.");
        }

        // 3. Configure CourseSelectionUI
        GameObject uiObj = GameObject.Find("VRCourseSelectionUI");
        if (uiObj != null)
        {
            CourseSelectionUI script = uiObj.GetComponent<CourseSelectionUI>();
            if (script != null)
            {
                SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(script);
                
                // Link scroll action
                var scrollProp = so.FindProperty("scrollAxisAction");
                if (scrollProp != null && scrollProp.objectReferenceValue == null)
                {
                    // Using GUID for the scroll action reference for reliability
                    // XRI Right Interaction/UI Scroll in 3.3.0 Starter Assets
                    string scrollPath = "Assets/Samples/XR Interaction Toolkit/3.3.0/Starter Assets/XRI Default Input Actions.inputactions/XRI Right Interaction/UI Scroll";
                    InputActionReference scrollRef = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<InputActionReference>(scrollPath);
                    if (scrollRef != null)
                    {
                        scrollProp.objectReferenceValue = scrollRef;
                        result.Log("Linked scrollAxisAction.");
                    }
                }

                so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
            }
        }
        
        result.Log("Application scripts and dependencies initialized.");
    }
}
